title: Botanical Handling
summary: Procedure for receiving, storing and handling botanicals used in spirit production.
purpose: To maintain product quality, traceability and food safety compliance.
safety_notes: Use safe manual handling techniques. Some botanicals may generate dust or allergens.

steps.title: Verify Delivery
steps.body: Check packaging condition, supplier documentation and batch details.

steps.title: Inspect Quality
steps.body: Confirm appearance, aroma and condition meet specifications.

steps.title: Record Inventory
steps.body: Enter receipt into VNDManuf and assign traceability information.

steps.title: Store Correctly
steps.body: Store in sealed containers away from moisture, sunlight and contamination sources.

steps.title: Issue to Production
steps.body: Pick botanicals according to approved production formulas.

steps.title: Record Consumption
steps.body: Record quantities used against the relevant work order.

troubleshooting: Quarantine any botanical material showing signs of mould, infestation or contamination.

title: Gin Production
summary: Standard process for producing gin batches.
purpose: To ensure consistent gin production and product quality.
prerequisites: Approved formula, released spirit and available production equipment.
safety_notes: Alcohol vapour is flammable. Follow all distillery safety procedures.

steps.title: Review Production Order
steps.body: Confirm batch size, formula version and production requirements.

steps.title: Prepare Ingredients
steps.body: Gather approved spirit, botanicals and processing aids.

steps.title: Verify Equipment Readiness
steps.body: Ensure equipment is clean and available for use.

steps.title: Load Batch
steps.body: Transfer spirit and botanicals in accordance with the approved process.

steps.title: Monitor Production
steps.body: Monitor quality parameters and process conditions.

steps.title: Collect Product
steps.body: Transfer finished gin to approved storage vessels.

steps.title: Perform Quality Checks
steps.body: Verify appearance, aroma, flavour and ABV.

steps.title: Close Work Order
steps.body: Record production results and inventory movements.

troubleshooting: Escalate any abnormal aroma, flavour or yield results to production management.

title: Vodka Production
purpose: To ensure consistent vodka quality and batch traceability.
safety_notes: Observe all alcohol handling and confined process area requirements.

steps.title: Verify Production Schedule
steps.body: Confirm product specification and required quantity.

steps.title: Prepare Spirit
steps.body: Verify source spirit quality and availability.

steps.title: Prepare Equipment
steps.body: Confirm cleaning and readiness status.

steps.title: Process Batch
steps.body: Operate production equipment according to approved procedures.

steps.title: Conduct QC Testing
steps.body: Verify appearance, aroma and ABV requirements.

steps.title: Transfer Product
steps.body: Move finished product into approved storage.

steps.title: Record Batch Data
steps.body: Complete production records and inventory transactions.

troubleshooting: Hold product pending QA review if specifications are not achieved.

title: Batch Blending
summary: Procedure for blending ingredients into finished products.
purpose: To ensure consistent flavour, quality and traceability.
safety_notes: Observe safe manual handling and chemical handling requirements.

steps.title: Review Formula
steps.body: Confirm recipe version and target batch size.

steps.title: Gather Ingredients
steps.body: Collect all required components.

steps.title: Verify Quantities
steps.body: Confirm ingredient weights and volumes.

steps.title: Add Ingredients
steps.body: Add materials according to the approved sequence.

steps.title: Mix Batch
steps.body: Blend until homogeneity is achieved.

steps.title: Collect Sample
steps.body: Perform quality checks before release.

steps.title: Record Results
steps.body: Document ingredient usage and yield.

troubleshooting: If flavour variation is detected, investigate ingredient additions and mixing records.

title: Bottling Operations
summary: Procedure for packaging product into bottles.
purpose: To ensure safe and consistent packaging operations.
prerequisites: Released product and approved packaging materials.
safety_notes: Watch for glass breakage hazards and moving machinery.

steps.title: Prepare Packaging Materials
steps.body: Verify bottles, closures and labels.

steps.title: Perform Line Clearance
steps.body: Remove all materials from previous production runs.

steps.title: Set Up Equipment
steps.body: Prepare filler and associated equipment.

steps.title: Verify Fill Volumes
steps.body: Conduct start-up checks and record results.

steps.title: Run Production
steps.body: Monitor fill levels, closures and presentation.

steps.title: Conduct Quality Inspections
steps.body: Inspect product appearance and packaging integrity.

steps.title: Reconcile Materials
steps.body: Record packaging usage and waste.

steps.title: Close Batch
steps.body: Complete production documentation.

risks.prevention: Conduct line clearance and first-off checks.
Handle bottles carefully and remove damaged items immediately.

troubleshooting: Stop production and investigate if repeated defects are detected.
